title: carya ovata f. polyneura
intro: Carya ovata f. polyneura, also known as the Shagbark Hickory, is a variety of the Shagbark Hickory tree (Carya ovata), characterized by its distinctive shaggy bark and edible nuts. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Carya ovata f. polyneura include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as tinctures, teas, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
